pred_reason: SWC-101 is applicable due to identified reentrancy vulnerabilities in the unStakeNFT function making external calls before state updates. SWC-107 is relevant because arithmetic operations lack proper safeguards despite SafeMath usage, risking overflows/underflows. Evidence: unStakeNFT violates Checks-Effects-Interactions pattern (Finding 8); External calls to claim functions precede state changes (Finding 2); Arithmetic operations in _deleteIndex and bonuses are vulnerable (Finding 5)
